zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Ferch Morgan Lloyd於1480年出生在英國威爾斯安格萊波多爾根時，她的父親Morgan Ap Lloyd15歲，母親Elizabeth Verch John15歲。她和James Griffith Davis至少有9個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1530年在英國威爾斯安格萊享年50歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯安格萊波多爾根。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Maude
meanings: habitational name from Mold in Flintshire, Wales, which name derives from Anglo-Norman French mont haut ‘high hill’ (Latinised as mons altus), the Norman name for Bailey Hill on which the castle stood. The name de Montalt, de Mohaut was borne by an Anglo-Norman aristocratic family who acted as castle wardens there but who had their chief seat in Riddlesden in Yorkshire, where the surname proliferated as Mawhood and Maude. In the 17th century one branch of the family acquired lands in Ireland. The Maude baronetcy of Dundrum, Tipperary, was created in 1705 for Robert Maude. His son Cornwallis Maude, Baron de Montalt, was created first Viscount Hawarden in 1793. Mowatt is the Scottish form of the name, from a different branch of the same family.

occasionally from Middle English and Norman French female personal name Mahald or Maud, which are Old French forms of ancient Germanic Mahthild (Latinised as Matilda), composed of the Germanic elements maht ‘might, power’ + hild ‘battle’. This personal name partly owed its great popularity among Normans in England to the fact that it was the name of the wife (c. 1031–83) of William the Conqueror. Surnames derived from this personal name are found in many forms and spellings, for example, Mould and Moll .

nameMeanings.name: Ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Lloyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: descriptive nickname from Welsh llwyd ‘gray’. InWelsh the color term llwyd also includes shades of brown, andit is likely that, when used with reference to younger men,llwyd denoted brown or mouse-colored hair.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Ferch Morgan Lloyd was born in 1480, in Bodorgan, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Morgan Ap Lloyd, was 15 and her mother, Elizabeth Verch John, was 15. She had at least 9 sons and 2 daughters with James Griffith Davis. She died in 1530, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Bodorgan, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles avec James Griffith Davis. ja.lifeSummary: Maud Ferch Morgan Lloydが1480年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイボドルガンで生まれた時，父Morgan Ap Lloydは15歳，母Elizabeth Verch Johnは15歳であった。彼女はJames Griffith Davisとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1530年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイで50歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズアングレセイボドルガンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Ferch Morgan Lloyd(이)가 1480년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 보도르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Morgan Ap Lloyd(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Verch John(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 James Griffith Davis(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 보도르건에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Ferch Morgan Lloyd родилась в 1480 г. в местности бодорган, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Morgan Ap Lloyd было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Verch John, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери от James Griffith Davis. Она умерла в 1530 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности бодорган, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания.
